{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Unit Manager",
  "description": "Kiishakiitan Ventures Limited is a real estate company founded by Seyi Bukola Oyemade and Tolulope Abosede Oyemade, a husband-and-wife team dedicated to transforming Nigeria&rsquo;s real estate sector.

The company is founded on credibility, integrity, and trust, with a mission to deliver affordable, modern, high-quality properties and to redefine real estate standards.

To support its growth, Kiishakiitan Ventures Limited established K &amp; K Construction Limited, a subsidiary specializing in engineering, infrastructure, and estate development. This ensures control over the entire value chain, from land acquisition to construction and property delivery.

Kiishakiitan Ventures Limited plans to transition into Kiishakiitan Holdings, expanding into investment, construction, and strategic property management services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Unit Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Real Estate Unit Manager is responsible for leading a specific sales or business unit within a real estate company.
	The role involves supervising a team of property consultants or sales executives, driving property sales and leasing activities, developing business opportunities, ensuring exceptional customer service, and achieving assigned revenue and performance targets.
	A Real Estate Unit Manager serves as the link between senior management and frontline sales staff, ensuring the unit consistently meets business objectives while delivering excellent service to clients and maintaining a high-performing sales team.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead, supervise, and motivate a team of real estate agents, property consultants, or sales executives.
	Develop and implement strategies to achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities, including property acquisitions, listings, and client referrals.
	Monitor team performance and provide coaching, mentoring, and regular performance evaluations.
	Conduct regular sales meetings, training sessions, and field support for team members.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with property owners, developers, investors, financial institutions, and corporate clients.
	Oversee property marketing campaigns across digital and traditional channels.
	Ensure accurate property listings and maintain an up-to-date property database.
	Guide clients through the buying, selling, leasing, and investment process.
	Negotiate contracts, pricing, and terms to achieve favorable outcomes for clients and the company.
	Ensure all transactions comply with applicable real estate laws, company policies, and ethical standards.
	Analyze market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences to identify growth opportunities.
	Prepare and present sales forecasts, pipeline reports, and performance reports to senior management.
	Resolve customer complaints and escalate complex issues when necessary.
	Collaborate with the marketing, legal, finance, and operations teams to ensure seamless transaction processing.
	Promote the company&#39;s brand and maintain a high level of professionalism in all client interactions.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Achievement of individual and team sales targets.
	Revenue and profitability growth.
	Number and value of property sales or lease transactions completed.
	New client acquisition and retention.
	Property listing growth.
	Customer satisfaction and referral rates.
	Team productivity and performance.
	Compliance with regulatory and company standards.
	Employee engagement and retention within the unit.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree / HND in Real Estate, Estate Management, Business Administration, Marketing, or a related discipline.
	3&ndash;7 years of experience in real estate sales, property management, or business development.
	At least 2 years of supervisory or team leadership experience is an advantage.
	Professional certification or real estate license (where applicable).


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Leadership and people management.
	Sales and business development.
	Negotiation and closing skills.
	Customer relationship management.
	Strategic planning and execution.
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Market analysis and forecasting.
	Financial and commercial awareness.
	Problem-solving and decision-making.
	Time management and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software.


Reporting Relationship:


	Reports to: Agency Manager, Branch Manager, Regional Sales Manager, or Head of Sales.
	Supervises: Real Estate Agents, Property Consultants, Sales Executives, Business Development Officers, and Sales Interns (where applicable).


Working Conditions:


	Combination of office work, client meetings, and property site visits.
	Frequent local travel to inspect properties and meet clients.
	May require evening or weekend work to accommodate client schedules and property viewings.
	Performance-driven environment with sales and revenue targets.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application to: kiishakiitan.ventures@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-04",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-31",

    "@type": "Organization",

Unit Manager Job at Kiishakiitan Ventures Limited




        
    

        
        Kiishakiitan Ventures Limited is a real estate company founded by Seyi Bukola Oyemade and Tolulope Abosede Oyemade, a husband-and-wife team dedicated to transforming Nigeria’s real estate sector.

The company is founded on credibility, integrity, and trust, with a mission to deliver affordable, modern, high-quality properties and to redefine real estate standards.

To support its growth, Kiishakiitan Ventures Limited established K & K Construction Limited, a subsidiary specializing in engineering, infrastructure, and estate development. This ensures control over the entire value chain, from land acquisition to construction and property delivery.
     

            
    



Kiishakiitan Ventures Limited plans to transition into Kiishakiitan Holdings, expanding into investment, construction, and strategic property management services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Unit Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Real Estate Unit Manager is responsible for leading a specific sales or business unit within a real estate company.
	The role involves supervising a team of property consultants or sales executives, driving property sales and leasing activities, developing business opportunities, ensuring exceptional customer service, and achieving assigned revenue and performance targets.
	A Real Estate Unit Manager serves as the link between senior management and frontline sales staff, ensuring the unit consistently meets business objectives while delivering excellent service to clients and maintaining a high-performing sales team.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead, supervise, and motivate a team of real estate agents, property consultants, or sales executives.
	Develop and implement strategies to achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities, including property acquisitions, listings, and client referrals.
	Monitor team performance and provide coaching, mentoring, and regular performance evaluations.
	Conduct regular sales meetings, training sessions, and field support for team members.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with property owners, developers, investors, financial institutions, and corporate clients.
	Oversee property marketing campaigns across digital and traditional channels.
	Ensure accurate property listings and maintain an up-to-date property database.
	Guide clients through the buying, selling, leasing, and investment process.
	Negotiate contracts, pricing, and terms to achieve favorable outcomes for clients and the company.
	Ensure all transactions comply with applicable real estate laws, company policies, and ethical standards.
	Analyze market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences to identify growth opportunities.
	Prepare and present sales forecasts, pipeline reports, and performance reports to senior management.
	Resolve customer complaints and escalate complex issues when necessary.
	Collaborate with the marketing, legal, finance, and operations teams to ensure seamless transaction processing.
	Promote the company's brand and maintain a high level of professionalism in all client interactions.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Achievement of individual and team sales targets.
	Revenue and profitability growth.
	Number and value of property sales or lease transactions completed.
	New client acquisition and retention.
	Property listing growth.
	Customer satisfaction and referral rates.
	Team productivity and performance.
	Compliance with regulatory and company standards.
	Employee engagement and retention within the unit.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree / HND in Real Estate, Estate Management, Business Administration, Marketing, or a related discipline.
	3–7 years of experience in real estate sales, property management, or business development.
	At least 2 years of supervisory or team leadership experience is an advantage.
	Professional certification or real estate license (where applicable).


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Leadership and people management.
	Sales and business development.
	Negotiation and closing skills.
	Customer relationship management.
	Strategic planning and execution.
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Market analysis and forecasting.
	Financial and commercial awareness.
	Problem-solving and decision-making.
	Time management and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software.


Reporting Relationship:


	Reports to: Agency Manager, Branch Manager, Regional Sales Manager, or Head of Sales.
	Supervises: Real Estate Agents, Property Consultants, Sales Executives, Business Development Officers, and Sales Interns (where applicable).


Working Conditions:


	Combination of office work, client meetings, and property site visits.
	Frequent local travel to inspect properties and meet clients.
	May require evening or weekend work to accommodate client schedules and property viewings.
	Performance-driven environment with sales and revenue targets.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Executive Assistant & Operations Officer",
  "description": "TMAsourcing Solutions - Our client, a growing travel and education consulting company focused on study abroad, relocation, and international opportunities, is&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Executive Assistant &amp; Operations Officer

Job Location: Lagos (Remote / Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Travel &amp; Business Consulting
&nbsp;Work Schedule: Monday -Friday
Working Hours: 9:00 AM -5:00 PM&nbsp;

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant &amp; Operations Officer to provide executive support to the CEO while coordinating admissions and visa operations, client communication, and administrative activities.
	The ideal candidate should be able to manage multiple responsibilities, maintain confidentiality, and ensure the smooth running of daily business operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the CEO&#39;s calendar, appointments, meetings, travel schedules, and provide day-to-day administrative support.
	Coordinate projects, follow up on assigned tasks, and prepare reports, meeting notes, and business documents.
	Support student admission and visa application processes by organizing documents, tracking application progress, following up with clients, and maintaining accurate records.
	Respond to enquiries via WhatsApp, email, and social media platforms, engage with prospective clients, and ensure prompt and professional communication.
	Support social media publishing, community engagement, and collaborate with the Social Media &amp; Admissions Support Officer to deliver excellent client service.
	Maintain organized digital filing systems, update CRM/client databases, prepare operational reports, coordinate internal communication, and support the smooth running of daily business operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND, HND, or B.Sc. in any discipline.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Administrative Officer, Operations Officer, or in a similar role.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong organizational, multitasking, and time management skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and online collaboration tools.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and work independently with minimal supervision.
	Strong attention to detail, problem-solving skills, and a proactive attitude.
	Experience in travel, education, consulting, customer service, or related industries is an added advantage.


Salary
N160,000 Monthly.

Benefits:


	HMO after probation
	Leave Allowance
	Pension (Statutory)
	Additional incentives upon meeting monthly targets.

Executive Assistant & Operations Officer Job at TMAsourcing Solutions




        
    

        
        TMAsourcing Solutions - Our client, a growing travel and education consulting company focused on study abroad, relocation, and international opportunities, is  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Executive Assistant & Operations Officer

Job Location: Lagos (Remote / Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Travel & Business Consulting
 Work Schedule: Monday -Friday
Working Hours: 9:00 AM -5:00 PM 

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant & Operations Officer to provide executive support to the CEO while coordinating admissions and visa operations, client communication, and administrative activities.
	The ideal candidate should be able to manage multiple responsibilities, maintain confidentiality, and ensure the smooth running of daily business operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the CEO's calendar, appointments, meetings, travel schedules, and provide day-to-day administrative support.
	Coordinate projects, follow up on assigned tasks, and prepare reports, meeting notes, and business documents.
	Support student admission and visa application processes by organizing documents, tracking application progress, following up with clients, and maintaining accurate records.
	Respond to enquiries via WhatsApp, email, and social media platforms, engage with prospective clients, and ensure prompt and professional communication.
	Support social media publishing, community engagement, and collaborate with the Social Media & Admissions Support Officer to deliver excellent client service.
	Maintain organized digital filing systems, update CRM/client databases, prepare operational reports, coordinate internal communication, and support the smooth running of daily business operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND, HND, or B.Sc. in any discipline.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Administrative Officer, Operations Officer, or in a similar role.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong organizational, multitasking, and time management skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and online collaboration tools.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and work independently with minimal supervision.
	Strong attention to detail, problem-solving skills, and a proactive attitude.
	Experience in travel, education, consulting, customer service, or related industries is an added advantage.


Salary
N160,000 Monthly.

Benefits:


	HMO after probation
	Leave Allowance
	Pension (Statutory)
	Additional incentives upon meeting monthly targets.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Marketer",
  "description": "Established in 2013, Bankyloolas is a leading food brand with three unique arms: Bankyloolas Cuisine; specializing in event catering across Nigeria. Bankyloolas Mobile; known for the best small chops, grills, and cocktails in Ibadan. Pasta Pan; Ibadan&rsquo;s No 1 place for pasta and peppersoup.

We are a top food brand in Ibadan, offering a wide range of delicious options and reliable food delivery for those wondering &ldquo;what or where to eat in Ibadan&rdquo; or searching for &ldquo;places to eat in Ibadan&rdquo;. Whether you&rsquo;re looking for quick bites, delicious pasta meals in Ibadan or catering for your next event, Bankyloolas has you covered!

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Marketer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time (In person)
Department: Strategy
Reports To: Head of Strategy/MD

Role Objectives


	The Social Media Marketer role is to increase Bankyloolas&#39; digital presence and foster meaningful engagement across social media platforms.
	This role is responsible for executing content strategies, managing online communities, running integrated campaigns, handling customer feedback, and administering loyalty programs &mdash; transforming digital engagement into measurable customer acquisition, retention, and satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Design and implement a results-driven social media strategy in alignment with company goals.
	Create platform-specific content (posts, stories, reels, videos) for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, etc.
	Engage audiences by responding to messages, comments, and reviews promptly and professionally.
	Cultivate vibrant online communities and encourage advocacy among followers.
	Maintain proactive and personalized communication with customers across channels.
	Plan and execute integrated digital campaigns that leverage both social media and CRM data to drive growth.
	Monitor and optimize campaign performance for both acquisition and retention.
	Implement and manage customer loyalty programs in accordance with the Bankyloolas Customer Loyalty Policy.
	Track program engagement, reward redemptions, and overall effectiveness.
	Analyze findings to recommend improvements to customer experience and content quality.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	20% monthly growth in social media engagement.
	100% response rate with an average response time under 5 minutes on all platforms.
	100% customer satisfaction rate.
	80% participation rate in loyalty initiatives.
	100% accuracy and punctuality in weekly/monthly performance reporting.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND / HND / Bachelor`s Degree
	Experience Required: Social Media Management of 2 years.


Process Flow:


	Social Media Planning &amp; Execution: Develop content calendar &rarr; Create content &rarr; Review internally &rarr; Schedule &amp; publish &rarr; Monitor results &rarr; Deduce report
	Online Community Management: Monitor platforms daily &rarr; Respond to interactions &rarr; Log feedback &amp; issues &rarr; Escalate when necessary
	Reporting:
	
		Weekly: Summary of social engagement, CRM metrics, and customer interactions
		Monthly: Comprehensive report with analytics, insights, and recommendations.
	
	


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: hrbankyloolas@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Marketer Job at Bankyloolas




        
    

        
        Established in 2013, Bankyloolas is a leading food brand with three unique arms: Bankyloolas Cuisine; specializing in event catering across Nigeria. Bankyloolas Mobile; known for the best small chops, grills, and cocktails in Ibadan. Pasta Pan; Ibadan’s No 1 place for pasta and peppersoup.

We are a top food brand in Ibadan, offering a wide range of delicious options and reliable food delivery for those wondering “what or where to eat in Ibadan” or searching for “places to eat in Ibadan”. Whether you’re looking for quick bites, delicious pasta meals in Ibadan or catering for your next event, Bankyloolas has you covered!
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Marketer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time (In person)
Department: Strategy
Reports To: Head of Strategy/MD

Role Objectives


	The Social Media Marketer role is to increase Bankyloolas' digital presence and foster meaningful engagement across social media platforms.
	This role is responsible for executing content strategies, managing online communities, running integrated campaigns, handling customer feedback, and administering loyalty programs — transforming digital engagement into measurable customer acquisition, retention, and satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Design and implement a results-driven social media strategy in alignment with company goals.
	Create platform-specific content (posts, stories, reels, videos) for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, etc.
	Engage audiences by responding to messages, comments, and reviews promptly and professionally.
	Cultivate vibrant online communities and encourage advocacy among followers.
	Maintain proactive and personalized communication with customers across channels.
	Plan and execute integrated digital campaigns that leverage both social media and CRM data to drive growth.
	Monitor and optimize campaign performance for both acquisition and retention.
	Implement and manage customer loyalty programs in accordance with the Bankyloolas Customer Loyalty Policy.
	Track program engagement, reward redemptions, and overall effectiveness.
	Analyze findings to recommend improvements to customer experience and content quality.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	20% monthly growth in social media engagement.
	100% response rate with an average response time under 5 minutes on all platforms.
	100% customer satisfaction rate.
	80% participation rate in loyalty initiatives.
	100% accuracy and punctuality in weekly/monthly performance reporting.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND / HND / Bachelor`s Degree
	Experience Required: Social Media Management of 2 years.


Process Flow:


	Social Media Planning & Execution: Develop content calendar → Create content → Review internally → Schedule & publish → Monitor results → Deduce report
	Online Community Management: Monitor platforms daily → Respond to interactions → Log feedback & issues → Escalate when necessary
	Reporting:
	
		Weekly: Summary of social engagement, CRM metrics, and customer interactions
		Monthly: Comprehensive report with analytics, insights, and recommendations.
	
	


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Field Recovery Officer",
  "description": "Royal Resource Digital Services is a creative agency helping businesses grow through modern web design, branding, and digital marketing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Recovery Officer

Job Locations: Lagos Island, Lekki, Victoria Island, Ikoyi &amp; Awoyaya - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking energetic, confident, and self-motivated Field Recovery Officers to join our team.
	The successful candidates will be responsible for recovering loan repayments and savings from clients while maintaining professional relationships and delivering excellent customer service.
	This is a field-based role that requires regular movement within assigned locations.


Key Responsibilities


	Visit clients at designated locations for loan and savings recovery.
	Follow up on overdue accounts professionally and respectfully.
	Negotiate repayment plans where necessary.
	Maintain accurate records of client interactions and collections.
	Submit daily field activity and recovery reports.
	Represent the company professionally at all times.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE, OND, HND, or Bachelor&#39;s Degree.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Confident, persuasive, and able to engage people effectively.
	Physically fit and comfortable with field work.
	Ability to work independently and meet recovery targets.
	Previous experience is not required. Successful applicants will receive comprehensive training.


Salary &amp; Benefits


	N100,000 Monthly Basic Salary
	Attractive Target-Based Performance Bonus
	Weekly Transport Allowance (paid separately from salary)
	Comprehensive Training
	Career Growth Opportunities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: Royalresourcemanagement@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Field Recovery Officer Job at Royal Resource Digital Services




        
    

        
        Royal Resource Digital Services is a creative agency helping businesses grow through modern web design, branding, and digital marketing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Recovery Officer

Job Locations: Lagos Island, Lekki, Victoria Island, Ikoyi & Awoyaya - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

            
    




	We are seeking energetic, confident, and self-motivated Field Recovery Officers to join our team.
	The successful candidates will be responsible for recovering loan repayments and savings from clients while maintaining professional relationships and delivering excellent customer service.
	This is a field-based role that requires regular movement within assigned locations.


Key Responsibilities


	Visit clients at designated locations for loan and savings recovery.
	Follow up on overdue accounts professionally and respectfully.
	Negotiate repayment plans where necessary.
	Maintain accurate records of client interactions and collections.
	Submit daily field activity and recovery reports.
	Represent the company professionally at all times.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE, OND, HND, or Bachelor's Degree.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Confident, persuasive, and able to engage people effectively.
	Physically fit and comfortable with field work.
	Ability to work independently and meet recovery targets.
	Previous experience is not required. Successful applicants will receive comprehensive training.


Salary & Benefits


	N100,000 Monthly Basic Salary
	Attractive Target-Based Performance Bonus
	Weekly Transport Allowance (paid separately from salary)
	Comprehensive Training
	Career Growth Opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Freelance Tech & Coding Tutor (Artificial Intelligence (AI)  Job at TechSpace




        
    

        
        TechSpace is a dynamic IT company dedicated to providing innovative solutions to businesses and organizations. Our team of skilled professionals is committed to delivering cutting-edge technology services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. With a focus on excellence, integrity, and customer satisfaction, we strive to empower businesses with the tools they need to succeed in today's digital landscape.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Freelance Tech & Coding Tutor (Artificial Intelligence (AI) 

Recruitment& Staffing

job Location: Jabi, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Part-time

Summary
     

            
    




	We're looking for skilled and passionate tutors to join us on a freelance basis across multiple tech fields.


Requirements


	Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in your field
	Ability to explain complex concepts in simple terms
	Good communication and teaching skills
	Previous tutoring or industry experience is a plus.


What We Offer


	Flexible schedule — teach on your own time
	Competitive Monthly Pay.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] cc [email protected] using "Freelance Tech & Coding Tutor" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
